fields.label: Язык по умолчанию
fields.description: Используется для приветственных сообщений и публичных страниц.

fields.label: Валюта
fields.description: Например, RUB, USD, EUR.

fields.label: Ссылка поддержки
fields.description: Куда вести пользователей за помощью.

fields.label: ID обязательного канала
fields.description: Telegram ID канала для проверки подписки. Если бот видит канал, ссылка кнопки будет получена автоматически.

fields.label: Ссылка на канал
fields.description: Необязательно: публичный @username или invite-link, если ссылку нельзя получить по ID канала.

fields.label: Публичный URL Mini App
fields.description: Например, https://app.example.com/.

fields.label: URL API Remnawave
fields.description: Например, https://panel.example.com/api.

fields.label: API-ключ Remnawave
fields.description: Секретный ключ API панели.

fields.label: Panel API total timeout
fields.description: Maximum total time for one Remnawave API request, in seconds.

fields.label: Panel API connect timeout
fields.description: Maximum time to get or open a Remnawave API connection, in seconds.

fields.label: Panel API socket connect timeout
fields.description: Maximum TCP/TLS connection time for Remnawave API, in seconds.

fields.label: Panel API socket read timeout
fields.description: Maximum time to wait for response data from Remnawave API, in seconds.

fields.label: Секрет вебхуков Remnawave
fields.description: Используется для проверки входящих вебхуков панели.
fields.webhook_hint: Use this URL as WEBHOOK_URL in Remnawave Panel.

fields.label: Internal Squads по умолчанию
fields.description: UUID через запятую для legacy-режима без JSON-каталога тарифов.

fields.label: External Squad по умолчанию
fields.description: Необязательный UUID External Squad для новых пользователей.

fields.label: Показывать описание подписки
fields.description: Текст появится перед выбором срока покупки или продления.

fields.label: Описание подписки (ZH)
fields.description: Русская версия текста на этапе оплаты.

fields.label: Описание подписки (EN)
fields.description: Английская версия текста на этапе оплаты.

fields.label: Таймаут запроса к провайдеру
fields.description: Максимальное общее время одного API-запроса к платёжному провайдеру, в секундах.

fields.label: Telegram Stars admin-only
fields.description: Shows Telegram Stars only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Payment callbacks remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Порядок методов оплаты
fields.description: Через запятую: severpay,freekassa,yookassa,platega,stars,cryptopay,heleket,paykilla,lava

fields.label: Invoice currency
fields.description: Fiat or crypto code (RUB, USD, USDT).

fields.label: Supported currencies
fields.description: Comma-separated invoice currencies allowed for Heleket in this shop. Heleket can reject unsupported codes per account/service.

fields.label: Target crypto
fields.description: Optional target cryptocurrency for conversion.

fields.label: Blockchain network
fields.description: Optional blockchain network code (tron, bsc, eth).

fields.label: Invoice lifetime (seconds)
fields.description: 300..43200; Heleket defaults to 3600.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Comma-separated IP addresses accepted for Heleket webhooks.

fields.description: Custom Chinese text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Telegram button text (EN)

fields.description: Emoji prepended to the Telegram bot payment button when customized.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: API key
fields.description: PayKilla public HMAC key with INVOICE permission.

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: PayKilla HMAC secret key. Never expose it client-side.

fields.label: Fallback invoice currency
fields.description: Currency used for PayKilla invoice creation when the tariff currency is not accepted by PayKilla as an invoice currency. Default: USD.

fields.label: PayKilla invoice currencies
fields.description: Comma-separated currencies accepted by PayKilla as invoice currency. Payments in other tariff currencies are converted to PAYKILLA_CURRENCY.

fields.label: Supported tariff currencies
fields.description: Comma-separated tariff/payment currencies that may use PayKilla. Unsupported PayKilla invoice currencies are converted before invoice creation.

fields.label: Accepted crypto tickers
fields.description: Comma-separated PayKilla tickers sent as paymentCurrencies. Default: USDTTRC,BTC,ETH,USDTBSC,USDTTON.

fields.label: Invoice type
fields.description: Optional override: FIAT_BASED, FIXED_AMOUNT, or OPEN_AMOUNT.

fields.label: Invoice lifetime (seconds)
fields.description: Used to send expiredAt to PayKilla.

fields.label: Request recvWindow (ms)
fields.description: Validity window for signed PayKilla API requests.

fields.label: Exchange rate URL
fields.description: No-key exchange rate endpoint used when tariff currency must be converted. Supports {source} and {target} placeholders.

fields.label: Exchange rate cache (seconds)
fields.description: How long PayKilla currency conversion rates and PayKilla limits are cached.

fields.label: Minimum payment amount
fields.description: Minimum payment amount accepted through PayKilla. The value is interpreted in PAYKILLA_MIN_PAYMENT_CURRENCY and converted for tariff currencies.

fields.label: Minimum payment currency
fields.description: Currency for PAYKILLA_MIN_PAYMENT_AMOUNT. Default: USD.

fields.label: Exact webhook URL
fields.description: Optional override for signature verification. Leave empty to use WEBHOOK_BASE_URL + /webhook/paykilla.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Optional comma-separated IP addresses accepted for PayKilla webhooks.

fields.label: WebApp button text (ZH)
fields.description: Custom Chinese text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button icon
fields.description: Lucide icon name rendered inside the Web App payment method button.

fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: Signs outgoing API requests (HMAC-SHA256 in the Signature header).

fields.label: Webhook secret
fields.description: The shop's additional key used to verify webhook signatures. Leave empty to reuse the secret key.

fields.label: Payment link lifetime (minutes)
fields.description: 1..7200; leave empty for the LAVA default.

fields.label: Payment services filter
fields.description: Comma-separated LAVA pay services to show on the payment page (e.g. card,sbp). Empty shows everything enabled for the shop.

fields.label: Public ID
fields.description: Public ID from the CloudPayments dashboard (HTTP Basic auth username).

fields.label: API secret
fields.description: API Secret from the CloudPayments dashboard. Used as the HTTP Basic auth password and to verify notification HMAC signatures.

fields.label: Recurring payments
fields.description: Allows CloudPayments token charges for subscription auto-renew. Requires Pay notifications with Token enabled in CloudPayments.

fields.label: Verify webhook signature
fields.description: Verify the Content-HMAC header on Pay/Fail notifications.

fields.label: Trusted IPs
fields.description: Optional comma-separated IP addresses accepted for CloudPayments webhooks.

fields.label: WebApp button text (ZH)
fields.description: Custom Chinese text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Telegram button text (EN)

fields.description: Emoji prepended to the Telegram bot payment button when customized.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Secret key
fields.description: Stripe secret API key used for Checkout Sessions and PaymentIntents.

fields.label: Webhook secret
fields.description: Stripe endpoint signing secret that starts with whsec_.

fields.label: Payment method types
fields.description: Comma-separated Checkout payment method types. Default: card.

fields.label: Supported currencies
fields.description: Optional comma-separated presentment currencies allowed for this Stripe account. Empty means no local filter.

fields.label: Recurring payments
fields.description: Save Checkout payment methods for off-session PaymentIntent auto-renewal.

fields.label: Verify webhook signature
fields.description: Verify the Stripe-Signature header using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

fields.label: Webhook tolerance seconds
fields.description: Allowed clock skew for Stripe webhook signatures.

fields.label: WebApp button text (ZH)
fields.description: Custom Chinese text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: WebApp button icon
fields.description: Lucide icon name rendered inside the Web App payment method button.

fields.label: Telegram button text (ZH)
fields.description: Custom Chinese text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button text (EN)
fields.description: Custom English text shown in Telegram bot payment buttons.

fields.label: Telegram button emoji
fields.description: Emoji prepended to the Telegram bot payment button when customized.

fields.label: Only for admins
fields.description: Shows this payment method only to users from ADMIN_IDS. Webhooks and provider services remain active for admin test payments.

fields.label: Дублировать уведомления о подписке на email
fields.description: Письма отправляются только пользователям с привязанным email и рабочим SMTP.

fields.label: Логировать действия администраторов
fields.description: Если выключено, события от пользователей из ADMIN_IDS не записываются в message logs.

fields.label: Глобальный уровень логов
fields.description: DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR

fields.label: ID треда поддержки
fields.description: Тред лог-чата для уведомлений о тикетах поддержки.

fields.label: Тикеты поддержки включены
fields.description: Показывает раздел поддержки в ЛК и включает создание тикетов.

fields.label: Email-уведомления админам
fields.description: Если выключено, новые тикеты и ответы пользователей останутся только в Telegram и лог-чате.

fields.label: Пауза Telegram-уведомлений
fields.description: Минимум секунд между повторными Telegram/log уведомлениями по одному непрочитанному тикету.

fields.label: Пауза email-уведомлений
fields.description: Минимум секунд между повторными email-уведомлениями по одному непрочитанному тикету.

fields.label: Макс. длина сообщения
fields.description: Максимальное количество символов в сообщении тикета.

fields.label: Макс. длина темы
fields.description: Максимальное количество символов в теме тикета.

fields.label: Лимит тикетов в час
fields.description: Сколько новых тикетов пользователь может создать за час. 0 — без лимита.

fields.label: Бэкапы включены
fields.description: Worker будет периодически собирать ZIP-архив и отправлять его в Telegram.

fields.label: ID чата для бэкапов
fields.description: Куда отправлять ZIP-архивы. Если пусто, используется LOG_CHAT_ID.

fields.label: ID треда для бэкапов
fields.description: Необязательный topic/thread ID. Если пусто, используется LOG_THREAD_ID.

fields.label: Период бэкапов (сек.)
fields.description: По умолчанию 3600: запуск на границе часа (12:00, 13:00 и т.д.).

fields.label: Сколько архивов хранить
fields.description: Сколько последних ZIP-архивов оставлять в data/backups на сервере.

fields.label: Добавлять compose-папку
fields.description: Добавляет snapshot /app/compose-source. Если папка не смонтирована, бэкап БД все равно будет создан.

fields.label: Embedded install guides
fields.description: Open install instructions inside the Web App instead of an external connect page.

fields.label: Open install guides from bot
fields.description: Use the Telegram Mini App install screen for bot connect buttons and show public install guide links.

fields.label: Use Remnawave Panel config
fields.description: Fetch Subscription Page config from Remnawave Panel by the user's subscription short UUID.

fields.label: Enable admin JSON override
fields.description: Use the JSON field below instead of Remnawave Panel config. Disabled by default.

fields.label: Subscription Page config path
fields.description: Fallback path to a Remnawave Subscription Page v1 JSON config file.

fields.label: Subscription Page config JSON
fields.description: Optional admin JSON override. It is applied only when the JSON override switch is enabled.

fields.label: Пакеты трафика
fields.description: Формат: 10:199,50:799 (ГБ:цена)

fields.label: Триал без Telegram
fields.description: Если выключено, email-only пользователю нужно привязать Telegram для активации триала. Disposable email домены всегда требуют Telegram.

fields.label: Internal Squads для триала
fields.description: UUID через запятую. Если пусто, используется USER_SQUAD_UUIDS.

fields.label: Приветственный бонус без Telegram
fields.description: Если выключено, email-only пользователю нужно привязать Telegram для получения реферального приветственного бонуса. Disposable email домены всегда требуют Telegram.

fields.label: Disposable email домены
fields.description: Домены по одному на строку или через запятую. Пользователи без Telegram с такими email не смогут получить trial или реферальный приветственный бонус.

fields.label: Drop non-private Telegram updates
fields.description: Drops group/channel messages and callbacks before DB-backed middleware runs.

fields.label: Telegram anti-flood enabled
fields.description: Enables soft per-user limits for extreme Telegram update floods.

fields.label: Anti-flood window
fields.description: Rolling window, in seconds, used by all Telegram anti-flood buckets.

fields.label: All updates limit
fields.description: Maximum total Telegram updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Messages limit
fields.description: Maximum message updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Button callbacks limit
fields.description: Maximum callback-query updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Inline queries limit
fields.description: Maximum inline-query updates from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: /start limit
fields.description: Maximum /start messages from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Expensive callbacks limit
fields.description: Maximum payment, trial, promo and account-changing callbacks from one actor during the window. 0 disables this bucket.

fields.label: Action cooldowns enabled
fields.description: Deduplicates repeated payment and trial button presses from the same user.

fields.label: Payment callback cooldown
fields.description: Seconds to suppress an exact repeated payment callback from the same user. 0 disables this cooldown.

fields.label: Trial callback cooldown
fields.description: Seconds to suppress an exact repeated trial activation callback from the same user. 0 disables this cooldown.

fields.label: Анонимная статистика установки
fields.description: Раз в сутки отправляет обезличенный сигнал: версия, маркер образа official/custom, ОС, локаль и число пользователей в виде диапазона. Без персональных данных, токенов и доменов. Помогает понять число активных установок, какие версии используются и долю изменённых сборок. Можно отключить здесь без перезапуска.

fields.label: Старые ref-ссылки Remnashop
fields.description: Принимать импортированные ref-коды Remnashop вместе с текущими кодами пользователей.

fields.label: Старые промокоды Remnashop
fields.description: Пробовать точное совпадение промокода перед обычной uppercase-нормализацией.

fields.label: Последний импорт Remnashop
fields.description: Заполняется скриптом импорта. Можно очистить, если отметка больше не нужна.

fields.label: Заметки по миграции Remnashop
fields.description: Внутренние заметки оператора по перенесенному инстансу.
